commands.review_summary:
The branch adds assistant chat audio/video media controls, Open/Download actions, inline PDF previews, CSS for attachment actions, and jsdom coverage.

PR surface: Source +93, Tests +99. Total +192 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: structured assistant audio and attachment items can carry raw URL strings, and the PR binds those values into href and object data. I did not run a browser path because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor-side changes are needed for the URL-safety blocker and real behavior proof, so this should not be queued as an automated repair while proof is missing.

target.title: feat(ui): add chat media download controls
target.body:
## Summary
- render assistant audio attachments with native controls in conversation
- render assistant video attachments with native controls in conversation
- add Open and Download actions for assistant media/document attachments, including inline PDF previews

## Verification
- git diff --check
- node --experimental-strip-types --check ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.ts ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.attachments.test.ts

Vitest was not run in this checkout because vitest/package.json is missing and Corepack pnpm failed locally.
target.author: lily-oc
